name: voice-cue-slide-tool-static
description: No-install browser-based voice cue slide player MVP for GitHub + Vercel

scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && cp index.html styles.css app.js sample_cues_50th.csv sample_project.vcue.json README.md DEPLOYMENT.md PRODUCT_PLAN.md GOOGLE_DRIVE_PHASE2.md VERCEL_GITHUB_DEPLOYMENT.md vercel.json dist/
